ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy of the portfolio */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the holding belongs to */,
  "asofdate" TEXT /* Date the holding data is valid as of */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the holding */,
  "CUSIP_hold" TEXT /* CUSIP number of the holding */,
  "numberofshare" REAL /* Number of shares or units held */,
  "marketvalue" REAL /* Market value of the holding */,
  "weighting" REAL /* Weighting of the holding within the portfolio */,
  "industry_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry sector the holding belongs to */,
  "industry_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry group the holding belongs to */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the holding */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the holding was purchased */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for bonds or other time-limited instruments */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate for bonds */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield for stocks */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_industry_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_group_id") REFERENCES industry_groups ("industry_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_industry_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_sector_id") REFERENCES industry_sectors ("industry_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_sectors" (
  "industry_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry sector */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the sector (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return of the sector */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_groups" (
  "industry_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry group */,
  "industry_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry sector the group belongs to */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the group (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return of the group */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used for access */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "asofdate" TEXT /* Date the performance data is valid as of */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Return rate of the portfolio */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio */,
  "benchmark_return" REAL /* Return rate of a benchmark for comparison */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the portfolio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holding involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of shares or units involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share or unit */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission associated with the transaction */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the transaction record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_transactions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_transactions_holding_id FOREIGN KEY ("holding_id") REFERENCES holdings ("holding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holding_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holding */,
  "asofdate" TEXT /* Date the historical data is valid as of */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the holding */,
  "CUSIP_hold" TEXT /* CUSIP number of the holding */,
  "numberofshare" REAL /* Number of shares or units held */,
  "marketvalue" REAL /* Market value of the holding */,
  "weighting" REAL /* Weighting of the holding within the portfolio */,
  "industry_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry sector the holding belongs to */,
  "industry_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry group the holding belongs to */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the holding */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the holding was purchased */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for bonds or other time-limited instruments */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate for bonds */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield for stocks */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the historical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holding_history_holding_id FOREIGN KEY ("holding_id") REFERENCES holdings ("holding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, sector analysis) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_reports_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
